title: CSS Anchor Positioning
description: Build a tooltip system using the CSS Anchor Positioning API, eliminating the need for JavaScript positioning logic
html:
This tooltip is positioned using CSS Anchor Positioning!

*
Footnote using anchor positioning.

validationRules.message: Note content should have yellow background

hints.text: CSS Anchor Positioning uses anchor-name on the anchor element and position-anchor + anchor() functions on the positioned element.
Set position-anchor: --btn-anchor on the tooltip. Use top: anchor(bottom) and left: anchor(center) with translate: -50% 8px to center below.
Use anchor-name on triggers, position-anchor and anchor() on positioned elements.
hints.code: .anchor-tooltip { position: fixed; position-anchor: --btn-anchor; top: anchor(bottom); left: anchor(center); translate: -50% 8px; }
